channel.title: Twitter Timeline RSS
channel.description: 你的 Twitter Following Timeline（via opencli）

item.title: Holding people accountable means understanding them and their circumstances well enough to assess wh...
item.description:
Holding people accountable means understanding them and their circumstances well enough to assess whether they can and should do some things differently, getting in sync with them about that, and, if they can't adequately do what is required, removing them from their jobs. It is not micromanaging them, nor is it expecting them to be perfect (holding particularly overloaded people accountable for doing everything excellently is often impractical, not to mention unfair).
But people can resent being held accountable, and you don't want to have to tell them what to do all the time. Reason with them so that they understand the value of what you're doing, but never let them off the hook. By interacting with my digital twin, you can evaluate your own decision-making processes and evolve your approach in real-time. The faster you evolve, the faster your results will follow. Click the link here to start our conversation now: https://t.co/daCo3GY70r
--- @RayDalio | ❤️ 31 | 🔁 4 | 💬 7 | 👁 3803
item.author: @RayDalio

item.title:
With lots of help from @clarklab I got rigging working
My model from @tripoai was too complex for M...
item.description:
With lots of help from @clarklab I got rigging working
My model from @tripoai was too complex for Mixamo, so he compressed / made it smaller
Now I exported the T-Pose as Soldier_TPose.fbx with the full texture etc, and exporting each animation individually like this:
Anim_Idle.fbx Anim_Walking.fbx Anim_CrouchedIdle.fbx Anim_CrouchedWalking.fbx Anim_Crawling.fbx Anim_FiringRifle.fbx Anim_Reloading.fbx Anim_HitReaction.fbx Anim_DeathFront.fbx Anim_DeathBack.fbx Anim_Running.fbx
Very cool!!!
--- @levelsio | ❤️ 15 | 🔁 1 | 💬 3 | 👁 5119
item.author: @levelsio
